headline: Pembina Business Update Highlights Strategic Focus and Growth Outlook
summary: CALGARY, Alberta, April 07, 2026--Pembina Pipeline Corporation ("Pembina" or "the Company") (TSX: PPL; NYSE: PBA) will hold a webcast and conference call on Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. MT (10:00 a.m. ET). During the call, Pembina's officer team will present a business update that reaffirms the Company’s longstanding commitment to disciplined execution; outlines the 3Cs Strategy - Capture, Connect, and Catalyze; and provides a financial outlook to the end of the decade, including 5-7 per
